content.explanation:
**Revision Day — Days 1-9 ka Quick Summary:**

आज हम पिछले 9 दिनों का revision करेंगे। हर topic का एक quick recap:

**Day 1 — Simple Present:** I eat, She eats, They go
**Day 2 — Introduction:** My name is..., I am from..., I work as...
**Day 3 — Imperatives:** Open!, Don't run!, Please sit down.
**Day 4 — Be Verb:** I am, He is, They are, I was, They were
**Day 5 — Demonstratives:** This/That (singular), These/Those (plural)
**Day 6 — Has/Have:** I have, She has, Do you have?
**Day 7 — Had:** I had, She had, Did you have?
**Day 8 — Will Have:** By tomorrow, I will have finished.
**Day 9 — There is/are:** There is a book. There are 5 chairs.
rules: Simple Present: I/We/You/They + base verb; He/She/It + verb+s
Be Verb: I am / He is / They are / I was / They were
Imperatives: base verb se shuru — Open!, Don't run!, Please sit.
Have/Has: I have / She has — Do you have? / Does she have?
Had: I/He/She/They had — Did you have?
Will Have: By + time + will have + V3
There is/are: There is (singular), There are (plural)
content.memoryTrick: **R-E-V-I-S-E:** Review Every Verb In Simple English! आज आप 9 topics के master हो गए!

examples.hindi: मैं रोज़ काम पर जाता हूँ।
examples.english: I go to work every day.

examples.hindi: मेरा नाम अनिल है और मैं इंजीनियर हूँ।
examples.english: My name is Anil and I am an engineer.

examples.hindi: उसके पास एक बड़ी गाड़ी है।
पहले मेरे पास एक कुत्ता था।
कल तक वह पहुँच चुका होगा।
examples.english: By tomorrow, he will have arrived.
There are three rooms in the house.

speakingTips: आज के दिन 9 topics में से हर एक पर 2-2 sentences बोलो
Mirror के सामने खड़े होकर self-introduction दो
किसी दोस्त से simple English में conversation करने की कोशिश करो

vocabulary.example: Let us review what we learned.

practice.hindi: मेरा नाम प्रिया है और मैं पुणे से हूँ।
practice.english: My name is Priya and I am from Pune.

practice.hindi: कल शाम तक मैं काम खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
practice.english: By tomorrow evening, I will have finished the work.

practice.hindi: इस कमरे में पाँच कुर्सियाँ हैं।
practice.english: There are five chairs in this room.

practice.hindi: मेरे पास कोई जानकारी नहीं थी।
alternatives: i did not have any information.

practice.hindi: क्या मेज़ पर कोई सेब है?
practice.english: Is there an apple on the table?

practice.hindi: मेरे जन्मदिन पर कोई आया नहीं था।
practice.english: There was no one at my birthday.

practice.hindi: अगले साल उसके पास कार होगी।
practice.english: Next year, he will have a car.
There are 20 floors in this building.

practice.hindi: उस समय उसके पास कुछ भी नहीं था।
practice.english: At that time, he had nothing.

practice.hindi: यह वह समय है जिसकी मुझे ज़रूरत है।
practice.english: This is the time I need.

practice.hindi: कल मीटिंग में बहुत लोग थे।
practice.english: There were many people at yesterday's meeting.
alternatives: there were a lot of people at the meeting yesterday.

practice.hindi: वह उस समय बहुत बीमार थी।
practice.english: She was very sick at that time.
alternatives: she was very ill at that time.

practice.english: The book is on the table.

practice.hindi: अगले महीने तक परियोजना तैयार हो जाएगी।
practice.english: The project will be ready by next month.
alternatives: by next month, the project will have been completed.
